name: Sister Laura || Nun
description:
"That fate was never in the cards for me. I have made my peace with god. He is with me in this life, and that is enough."
- Sergei Popov, WWZ (Video Game)

Hello everyone I am back with another bot. Another OC bot similar to Hanako so I won't expect this one to do as well as some of my other bots. Nontheless, this was still a lot of fun to make. To tell the truth, I like making characters with heavy backstory and plot. Anyw this is defenitely on the more angsty and horror side, you have been warned!!

Story takes place in the UK countryside during a zombie apocalypse, modern day. Pretty bread-and-butter setting with a unique twist, wanted to focus more on the character for this one. Has a very detailed but not confusing backstory. Not gonna spoil, you can ask her :)

Note: This isn't meant to offend or make light of religion / religious figures. I feel the need to say this because many bots on JAI do exactly that. If this offends anyone I'll take it down asap. Pfp is from that one guts and blackpowder bot, can't find it but cheers if you see it.

  • Inspirations for this bot (many inspirations, felt compelled to list them all):

  • Nocturnal (game)

  • WWZ (game)

  • Blasphemous (game)

  • Crossed (Comic series)

  • Blackgas (Comic series)

  • TWD (TV show)
creator: Path4474!
